questions.question: There's no verified fix staged yet. How do you want to proceed before releasing?

options.label: I'll paste the error text
options.description: You give me the exact red 'Could not open file: …' message (it names the path + errno). I fix the precise cause, verify with vitest+typecheck+e2e, then commit, push, and release. Most accurate.

options.label: Ship a hardening fix now
options.description: I implement my best-judgment fix for the whole click-to-open flow (OSC 8 file links → in-app viewer, surface HTML iframe errors instead of silent blank, harden path handling), verify the full suite, then commit/push/release — without confirming the exact cause first.

options.label: Let me reproduce it first
options.description: I drive the built app via the e2e harness to reproduce the click and capture the real error myself, then fix + verify + release. Slower but no input needed from you.
